revision.text:
[[de:Chatiu-Dämonen]][[es:Demonios chatiu]][[pt:Daemons-Chatiu]] {{Infobox hieroglyphs |TITLE = Chatiu |NAME = Aa1-G38-M17-G43 N15The use of the sign G38 contradicts the assumed spelling. This is due to the partially {{ill|cryptographic writing|de|Altägyptische Kryptographie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cryptographic writing|qid=Q447064|1=Ancient Egyptian cryptography}} found in the Nutbook. See: Alexandra von Lieven: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch.'' p. 170. |NAME-EXPLANATION = Chatiu
''Ḫ3.tjw''
''Corpses'' }} The '''Chatiu demons''', also referred to as “{{ill|cadaver|lt=the corpse-demons|de|Leiche|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cadaver|qid=Q48422|1=Cadaver}},” represent the seven invisible {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qid=Q804527}} in {{ill|Egyptian mythology|en|Egyptian mythology|qid=Q205740|lt=Egyptian mythology|1=Egyptian mythology}} and {{ill|Egyptian astronomy|en|Egyptian astronomy|qid=Q751843|lt=astronomy in ancient Egypt|1=Egyptian astronomy}}. Each of the 36 {{ill|Constellation|en|Constellation|qid=Q8928|lt=decan constellations|1=Constellation}} transforms once a year from a living Baktiu to a dead Chatiu when entering the {{ill|Duat|en|Duat|qid=Q871389|lt=Duat|1=Duat}}. In the {{ill|Book of Nut|en|Book of Nut|qid=Q2005559|lt=Nutbook|1=Book of Nut}}, the Dekan chapter describes the negative effects of these {{ill|Demon|en|Demon|qid=Q177413|lt=demons|1=Demon}} when "the hidden names of the gods" are spoken publicly. The role of the Chatiu demons is also addressed in the {{ill|embalming ritual|de|Mumifizierung im Alten Ägypten|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/embalming ritual|qid=Q1952604|1=Mummification in ancient Egypt}}, during which the deceased is promised the transformation of their {{ill|Ba (Egyptian soul)|de|Ba (ägyptische Mythologie)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ba (Egyptian soul)|qid=Q1129404|1=Ba (Egyptian soul)}} into any of the 36 decan stars.Serge Sauneron: ''Rituel de l'Embaumement - pBoulaq III, pLouvre 5.158.'' Cairo 1952, p. 24, lines 12–25, 1, and p. 29, lines 5–8. In the {{ill|Papyrus Louvre 2420c|de|Papyrus Louvre 2420c|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Louvre 2420c|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}, the owner of a {{ill|Sarcophagus|en|Sarcophagus|qid=Q48634|lt=sarcophagus|1=Sarcophagus}} requests to be accepted among the Chatiu demons in an inscription. In the {{ill|Book of the Dead|en|Book of the Dead|qid=Q174361|lt=Egyptian Book of the Dead|1=Book of the Dead}}, Spell 158 formalizes this wish in the “Spell for a Golden {{ill|Usekh collar|en|Usekh collar|qid=Q253052|lt=collar|1=Usekh collar}}”: "Release me, look at me. I am one of those (Chatiu decans) who belong to the {{ill|release|de|Lösung (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/release|qid=Q1879811|1=Q1879811}} when they see {{ill|Geb|en|Geb|qid=Q168444|lt=Geb|1=Geb}}."Edda Bresciani et al.: ''La tomba di Ciennehebu, capo del flotta del Re.'' Pisa 1977, p. 83. Any individual granted this request in the {{ill|afterlife|de|Totenreich|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/afterlife|qid=Q154365|1=Underworld}} achieves new life, mirroring the {{ill|Reincarnation|en|Reincarnation|qid=Q128593|lt=reincarnation|1=Reincarnation}} and rebirth of the decan star. == Literature == * {{ill|Edda Bresciani|en|Edda Bresciani|qid=Q3718903|lt=Edda Bresciani|1=Edda Bresciani}} et al.: ''La tomba di Ciennehebu, capo del flotta del Re.'' Giardini, Pisa 1977. * Serge Sauneron: ''Rituel de l'Embaumement - pBoulaq III, pLouvre 5.158.'' Imprimerie Nationale, Cairo 1952. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qid=Q2643704|1=Alexandra von Lieven}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch.'' The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5. == References == [[de:Chatiu-Dämonen]] [[es:Demonios chatiu]] [[pt:Daemons-Chatiu]] {{translated page|de|Chatiu-Dämonen|version=250869323}} {{wikidata link|Q1068237}}
